programme.title: City Island
programme.desc: Meet the Rizzos, a fuedel family in the throws of battle as their bizarre and layered lies unravel.

programme.title: Bad Blood: Hatfields & McCoys
programme.desc: Two families seek vengeance against each other as they unmercifully attempt to destroy each other's loved ones

programme.title: Goodnight for Justice
programme.desc: A judge travels the Old West to find the outlaw who murdered his family years earlier.

programme.title: Goodnight for Justice: The Measure of a Man
programme.desc: Goodnight crosses paths with a stagecoach under attack and comes to the rescue of its passengers.

programme.title: Goodnight for Justice: Queen of Hearts
programme.desc: John William Goodnight discovers the teenage boy on the wrong side of the law is actually his son.

programme.title: Chasing Mavericks
programme.desc: Hearing that the Mavericks surf break is real, a teen asks a local legend to teach him how to ride the wave.

programme.title: Woman in Gold
programme.desc: A woman battles the establishment to recover her family possessions that had been seized by Nazis during WWII.

programme.title: Detroit
programme.desc: During the 1967 Detroit riots, a group of rogue police officers respond to a complaint with retribution.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: A biography of sports legend Muhammad Ali, focusing on his triumphs and controversies between 1964 and 1974.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: When his brother goes missing, Tommy, the family's black-sheep, cares for his sister-in-law and nieces.

programme.title: Awake
programme.desc: While undergoing surgery, a wealthy young man discovers that the surgical team intended to murder him.

programme.title: Detachment
programme.desc: A substitute teacher finds a connection to the students and teachers during his latest assignment.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
